sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Virtus Total Return Fund Inc. (ZTR) Stock Forecast & Price Prediction 2026–2030
feed.summary: This article provides a stock forecast and price prediction for Virtus Total Return Fund Inc. (ZTR) for the years 2026 to 2030, and beyond to 2057. It includes short-term forecasts, long-term monthly predictions, and a technical analysis based on moving averages and indicators. The sentiment for ZTR is currently neutral, with forecasts suggesting a potential decrease in price in the near term but long-term growth.

feed.title: YMAX ETF Analysis: Dividends, Returns AMEX:YMAX
feed.summary: This article provides an in-depth analysis of the YieldMax Universe Fund of Option Income ETFs (YMAX), an actively managed fund-of-funds. It details YMAX's investment strategy, which involves synthetic covered call options to generate monthly income, and highlights its high dividend yield of 81.87%. The analysis also covers key metrics such as AUM, expense ratio, and recent performance, noting its unique approach of not directly investing in underlying stocks but rather in other YieldMax ETFs.

feed.title: York Water (YORW) Margin Compression Tests Premium Valuation Narrative
feed.summary: York Water (YORW) reported steady FY 2025 Q3 revenue of US$20.4 million and EPS of US$0.43, but its premium valuation is being tested by margin compression. The company's 26.1% net profit margin is down from 28.6% last year, raising concerns about sensitivity to financing costs, dividend coverage, and a P/E of 24x which is above the industry average and DCF fair value. Investors are evaluating if its mid-single-digit growth narrative can continue to justify its higher valuation amidst these financial pressures.

feed.title: XPeng delivers 15,256 vehicles in February as P7+ goes global
feed.summary: XPeng announced delivery of 15,256 vehicles in February 2026, a seasonal slowdown from January but narrowing the gap for its ambitious 2026 target. The company also commenced global deliveries of its updated P7+ liftback sedan to 18 countries and confirmed Volkswagen will be the launch customer for its second-generation VLA autonomous driving system, highlighting XPeng's strategy to leverage technology licensing as a revenue stream alongside vehicle sales.

feed.title: XTEN Stock Fund Price and Chart — AMEX:XTEN
feed.summary: This article provides a detailed overview of the BondBloxx Bloomberg Ten Year Target Duration US Treasury ETF (XTEN), including its price, chart, key statistics, and fund composition. It highlights XTEN's assets under management, dividend yield, expense ratio, and its passive management style tracking the Bloomberg US Treasury 10 Year Target Duration Index. The article also includes technical analysis, seasonal trends, and a comprehensive FAQ section addressing common investor questions about ETFs and XTEN specifically.

feed.title: Yelp: I'm Waiting For An Even Better Price (NYSE:YELP)
feed.summary: Yelp (YELP) faces significant long-term business model risks due to competition from Google and changing user behavior, impacting its relevance. Despite low valuation multiples, the stock's upside is limited by these structural headwinds and declining ad clicks. While management's cost controls and data licensing stabilize revenue, they don't fully offset the fundamental challenges.

feed.title: XLG Stock Fund Price and Chart — AMEX:XLG
feed.summary: This article provides a detailed overview of the Invesco S&P 500 Top 50 ETF (XLG), including its price performance, key statistics like AUM and expense ratio, and investment strategy. It highlights that XLG focuses on the 50 largest companies within the S&P 500, offering investors exposure to U.S. mega-cap performance. The article also includes technical analysis, seasonal trends, and frequently asked questions about the ETF.

feed.title: XHB ETF Analysis: Dividends, Returns AMEX:XHB
feed.summary: This article provides an in-depth analysis of the State Street SPDR S&P Homebuilders ETF (XHB), detailing its investment strategy, asset allocation, and performance metrics. XHB offers diversified exposure to the homebuilding sector, albeit with an equal-weighting methodology that can dilute stakes in leading companies. The piece also covers its dividend history, fund flows, and an overview of its holdings and related financial details.

feed.title: WIA - Western Asset Inflation-Linked Income Fund Portfolio Composition as of December 31, 2018
feed.summary: The Western Asset Inflation-Linked Income Fund (WIA) announced its portfolio composition as of December 31, 2018. The fund's primary objective is current income, with secondary capital appreciation. Its portfolio primarily consists of inflation-linked securities, with significant holdings in mortgage-backed securities and emerging market debt, and a high credit quality allocation of AAA.

feed.title: GS Finance notes (GS): 125% upside participation, 20% buffer, callable Mar 2027
feed.summary: GS Finance Corp. is offering principal-at-risk, non-interest notes guaranteed by The Goldman Sachs Group, Inc., linked to an equally weighted basket of nine stocks. These notes offer 125% upside participation, a 20% buffer level, and an expected maturity of March 9, 2028. The notes are callable on March 19, 2027, potentially yielding at least $1,174 per $1,000 face amount if the basket level meets conditions.

feed.title: Oracle outage knocks TikTok offline for some US users
feed.summary: An Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI) outage, particularly affecting its US East (Ashburn) region, caused TikTok services to go offline for some US users. This marks the second such interruption for TikTok USDS, which hosts US user data on Oracle's cloud infrastructure, contradicting Oracle CEO Larry Ellison's past claims about the cloud's reliability. Oracle has since resolved the issue, which began on March 3rd and was confirmed recovered by March 4th.

feed.title: Broadridge Advancing Pass-Through Voting Across the Asset Management Industry and Powering Individual Investor Voice
feed.summary: Broadridge Financial Solutions announced an enhancement to its ProxyVote® platform, integrating pass-through voting capabilities directly within the existing proxy ballot experience for individual investors. This initiative aims to streamline shareholder engagement and expand investor choice in corporate governance. Vanguard will be the first asset manager to adopt this new capability as part of its Vanguard Investor Choice program, simplifying participation for investors holding Vanguard funds on third-party platforms.

feed.title: Guarantor: JPMorgan Chase & Co.
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase Financial Company LLC has issued $854,000 in Digital Barrier Notes linked to NVIDIA Corporation's common stock, due June 1, 2027. feed.title: Alliant Energy Secures New $400 Million Term Loan Facility
feed.summary: Alliant Energy (LNT) has secured a new $400 million term loan facility, with an incremental option for an additional $100 million, maturing in 2027. This facility is intended for general corporate purposes, including working capital and debt refinancing. While it provides liquidity, it also comes with covenants such as a debt-to-capital ratio limit and restrictions on liens, and analysts currently rate LNT as a "Hold" with a $73.00 price target. According to TipRanks’ AI Analyst Spark, LNT is Neutral, citing strong profitability and constructive technical trends despite weak cash generation and rising leverage.

feed.title: Zscaler (NASDAQ:ZS) Stock Rating Upgraded by Wells Fargo & Company
feed.summary: Wells Fargo & Company has upgraded Zscaler (NASDAQ:ZS) to a "strong-buy" rating, indicating bullish sentiment. This upgrade follows Zscaler's strong Q2 2026 performance with revenue of $816M and EPS of $1.01, surpassing estimates, and management's favorable FY26 EPS guidance. Despite the positive news, the stock is trading significantly below its 1-year high, and some analysts have lowered price targets, while insiders have been net sellers, presenting a mixed outlook for near-term investor sentiment.

feed.title: Advisor moves: Raymond James adds $700m Denver team, Osaic recruits $464m Texas firm
feed.summary: Two wealth management firms, overseeing over $1 billion in combined client assets, have transitioned to new platforms to enhance growth and succession plans. Raymond James recruited Wilkins Lamb Wealth Advisors from RBC Capital Markets, a Denver-based team managing $700 million. Separately, Gardner Wallace Financial Solutions, managing $464 million, joined Osaic through Advisory Resource Group, moving from Kestra to prepare for future growth and improve technology and operational support.

feed.title: Citigroup (NYSE: C) offers autocalled S&P‑futures notes with up to 70% premium
feed.summary: Citigroup Global Markets Holdings Inc. is offering autocallable market-linked notes tied to the S&P 500 Futures 35% Intraday Edge Volatility TCA 6% Decrement Index (USD) ER. These notes, with a stated principal of $1,000, have a pricing date of March 31, 2026, and a maturity date of April 3, 2031, unless redeemed earlier. They offer potential for automatic early redemption with premiums ranging from 14% to 70% of the principal, linked to specific premium threshold values of the underlying index.

feed.title: Citigroup (C) issues autocalled notes linked to S&P futures index with 6% decrement
feed.summary: Citigroup Global Markets Holdings Inc. is offering autocallable medium-term senior notes due March 18, 2031, linked to the S&P 500 Futures 40% Edge Volatility 6% Decrement Index. These notes offer potential for automatic early redemption with premiums if the underlying index meets specified autocall barriers, but expose investors to significant downside risk and do not guarantee principal repayment. The underlying index is highly risky due to its leveraged exposure, 6% annual decrement, and implicit financing costs, which can significantly amplify losses and lead to underperformance compared to the S&P 500 Index. Investors should be aware of the limited liquidity, credit risk of Citigroup, and the complexity of these structured products.

feed.title: Focus Partners Advisor Solutions LLC Purchases 11,201 Shares of Citigroup Inc. $C

feed.title: Citigroup (NYSE: C) offers Nasdaq-100 buffer notes with 15% downside protection
feed.summary: Citigroup Global Markets Holdings Inc. is offering medium-term senior notes, or "buffer securities," linked to the Nasdaq-100 Index®, guaranteed by Citigroup Inc. These notes provide 100% upside participation up to a maximum return of at least 15.55% and include a 15% downside buffer against losses. The securities mature on April 8, 2027, with payments at maturity depending on the Nasdaq-100's performance relative to initial and buffer values.

feed.title: Autocallable notes linked to AMZN & AAPL — Citigroup (NYSE: C)
feed.summary: Citigroup Global Markets Holdings Inc. is offering autocallable contingent-coupon equity-linked securities linked to the performance of Amazon.com, Inc. and Apple Inc., maturing on September 16, 2027. These notes provide a potential annualized contingent coupon of 11.10% if both underlying stocks are at or above 55% of their initial value, but investors face significant risks, including the potential loss of their investment if the worst-performing stock falls below a final barrier. The securities are unsecured debt obligations guaranteed by Citigroup Inc. and are not listed on any exchange, limiting secondary market liquidity.

feed.title: Ziff Davis Divests Connectivity Division in $1.2B Deal
feed.summary: Ziff Davis has agreed to sell its Connectivity division to Accenture for $1.2 billion in cash, a move unanimously approved by its board. The deal, which includes various covenants, indemnification clauses, and termination rights, is expected to close in the coming months. This divestiture aims to reshape Ziff Davis's portfolio and sharpen its strategic focus, while Accenture will expand its connectivity capabilities.
